gist.headline: Apiction joins the hive
gist.blurb: Apiction has landed in our community showcase! Now you can chat with any AI model from any provider—including Pollinations—all from one cozy interface.
gist.summary: Added Apiction to the community app showcase, highlighting a new platform for chatting with multiple AI models.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Apiction in the ecosystem to seamlessly interact with Pollinations alongside other AI providers.
gist.visual_concept: Apiction is a multi-model chat interface. The scene should depict Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot happily chatting or looking at a chat interface together. A cozy cafe or communication hub setting represents the 'chat with any provider' aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot sitting at a small cafe table, happily chatting. The robot's screen glows with a colorful chat interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot sitting at a small cafe table, happily chatting. The robot's screen glows with a colorful chat interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
